soft_deny: Placing or modifying live trading orders against any IBKR account (paper OR live) without an explicit per-turn user authorization in the latest message. trade_enabled flag flips, preview, place, cancel, and config writes against namespace=broker key=*.trade_enabled all count.
Rotating production mTLS certs / publishing secrets to /api/admin/secrets/** without explicit 'run provision-and-publish.ps1' (or equivalent) in the latest user message. -DryRun invocations are fine.
Stopping or restarting IBKR sidecars (taskkill, Stop-Process, schtasks /End, gsudo elevated kills) outside an explicit user-authorized canary or sidecar-redeploy turn.
Moving/deleting/swapping production binaries under /mnt/c/dashboard/sidecar/dist/** without explicit user authorization in the latest message.
